creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-10-11 14:51:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/arp-scan         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  arp-scan is a command-line tool that uses the ARP
  protocol to discover and fingerprint IP hosts on
  the local network.
  
  WWW:    http://www.nta-monitor.com/tools/arp-scan/
  
  PR:             ports/127963
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2038    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/net/arp-scan/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/arp-scan/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/arp-scan/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/net/arp-scan/pkg-plist (new)
